videoSnippet.title: This is Not an April Fool’s Day Joke! || Sindarov vs Caruana || FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026 R4
videoSnippet.description:

Sindarov, Javokhir (2745) - Caruana, Fabiano (2795)
FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026 | Open (Chess.com) [04] 2026.04.01
D26 Queen's Gambit Accepted, classical variation, 6.O-O

1.d4 d5 2.c4 e6 3.Nf3 dxc4 4.e3 Nf6 5.Bxc4 c5 6.O-O Nc6 7.Qe2 a6 8.Nc3 b5 9.Bd3 Bb7 10.a4 b4 11.Ne4 Na5 12.Nxf6+ gxf6 13.dxc5 Nb3 14.c6 Bxc6 15.Nd4 Nxd4 16.exd4 Rg8 17.g3 f5 18.Bc4 Rg4 19.Be3 Bd5 20.Rac1 Be7 21.Bxa6 Kf8 22.Bb5 Bf6 23.Rfd1 Kg7 24.Bc6 Ra5 25.Bxd5 Rxd5 26.Rc5 Rd7 27.d5 exd5 28.Qf3 Bxb2 29.Rcxd5 Rxd5 30.Rxd5 Qe8 31.Rxf5 Rg6 32.h4 Bc3 33.h5 Ra6 34.Qg4+ Kh8 35.Bd4+ f6 36.Rc5

0:01 Hello Everyone!
01:50 Game Starts!!
03:37 Completely New Game!
13:00 It Was In This Position!
16:00 Standings after ROUND 2
